div.p: Multi-path failure detection with k=3 indirect probes
False Positive Reduction With packet loss rate p and k helpers: P(false positive) = p^(2k) For p=5%, k=3: 0.05^6 ≈ 0.0000000156 vs. direct probe only: 0.05 = 5%

g.text: Step 1: A sends ping-req to k helpers
Step 2: Each helper probes B directly
Step 3: B responds to each helper
Step 4: Any helper success = B is ALIVE
